sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73648" key="o(moiologi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὁμοιο-λογία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n73648.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">uniformity of style,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Quint.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.3.52</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
